headline: Assessing Prudential Financial (PRU) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
summary: What recent performance tells you about Prudential Financial (PRU) Prudential Financial (PRU) has drawn investor attention after a recent stretch of mixed share performance, with a modest 1 day gain, a positive monthly return, but a negative move over the past 3 months. The stock last closed at US$99.78, with year to date and past 3 month returns in negative territory, while the 1 year total return, 3 year total return, and 5 year total return all remain positive for longer term holders. See...
